_comment_client_id: Microsoft Entra application (client) ID. The literal below is a placeholder for debug/test builds and is replaced with BuildConfig.MSAL_CLIENT_ID at runtime via a future manifestPlaceholders migration (plan docs/plans/repo-auth-msgraph-oauth-provider.md section 5.4). CTO-owned production value is provisioned via local.properties msal.client.id.
_comment_redirect_uri: msauth://<applicationId>/<base64url-encoded-keyhash>. Keyhash differs per signing certificate (debug vs release) — final value must be registered in the Microsoft Entra app registration Android platform. PLACEHOLDER_KEYHASH is a build-time sentinel that will be replaced by a build variant source-set override or manifestPlaceholders splice.
